name: Will my occupational illness prevent SSDI or affect it?

mainEntity.name: Will my occupational illness prevent SSDI or affect it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Can get both; offsets limit total[4].
acceptedAnswer.description:
No; can get both, offset rules apply.

Workers comp reduces SSDI max 80%[4].

- Apply SSDI separately.
- Comp first.
- Lawyer coordinates.

Maximize combined.
